title: Lamb and Wolf |Origin|
description: An Origin datapack that adds Lamb and Wolf to the game.
body:
# Hello again. Today i present you Lamb and Wolf.
Both of them are same origin, in which you are able to switch between them whenever you want. Both of origins serve different purpose: 
* Lamb is supportive and peaceful origin that is perfect for relaxing and carefree gameplay, she can support her friends in more than one way, be it healing, cleansing negative effects or applying positive ones. Mobs aren't a threat to her and she has great mobility.

* Wolf, on the other hand, is a killing machine. He is unable to hold any itemss and forced to perform slaughter to survive. He has huge speed, great stats and his damage output will turn any foe into bloody stain in just 2 seconds. He is constantly hungry and needs to kill non undead creatures in order to survive.
You can switch between those forms with 2 minutes cooldown, so be ready to fight for your life during this time while you are a wolf. Now let's get into details.
# Lamb
## Passives
### Saint
- No one can deal any damage to you. If you dealt damage in last 20 seconds this ability no longer works.
### Shy
- You can't use items, break blocks, use blocks when there is another player in 8 blocks radius that you can see
### Nice company
- Players around you are constantly cleared of any negative effects
### Pure
- You have 7 hearts and deal nearly no damage
### Feather
- You are really light, fast in the air and can stand on creature’s heads, like on blocks
### Lamb
- You emit some lamb noises and can eat wheat (You are also small)
### Sin
- You feel it inside of yourself, he is calling out to you… You have to stifle this gnawing urge by consuming 10 or more raw meat… Or take your true form

## Active skills:

### [​Primary] Hop! 
- You can make a small hop in the direction you are looking. Restores when you touch the ground or stand on creatures.
### [​Secondary] Hug! 
- Hug your friend really really close, and restore their health to maximum.
### [​Secondary] Smooch! 
- Kiss your friend while sneaking, and give them two random positive effects for one minute
-Hugging and smooching players will make them your friends, allowing you to build around them, and allowing them to hit you.
### [​LoadToolbar] In sheep’s clothes 
- Take your true form for as long as you want.

# Wolf

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Passives
### Unleashed 
- You can't hold any item in your hands or wear armor, can't use entities or blocks.
### Slaughterer’s claws 
- Your attacks deal 6 piercing damage and break blocks really fast. You also ignore invulnerability frames.
### Big bad wolf
- You are 50% bigger, have 50% more hp, take 50% less damage from any source, have 10 points of armor, move faster and jump higher.
### Hunger
- You are constantly really hungry, you can’t eat any food, and to satiate yourself you need to kill meaty prey or hit players. Hunger deals 3 times more damage to you.
### Bloodlust
- You can smell living creatures that have less than 90% hp. Blood taints your screen increasing your movement speed
### Burn the monster 
- Iron tools deal triple damage to you. Fire deals triple damage to you.

## Active skills:
### Leap 
- You can make a powerful leap in the direction you are looking, upon landing root creatures around you for 5 seconds. Restores when you deal damage to a player 5 times, or kill a prey 5 times.
### Bite 
- Bite your target dealing 10 damage, if the target dies you will restore 10 hp.
### In sheep’s clothes 
- Return to your true form.

</details>
